intro_message: Hi {name}, thanks for supporting this ITU citizen-experience pilot. This WhatsApp questionnaire takes about 4 minutes. Your responses are anonymous and help compare regulatory intent with lived telecom experience.
closing_message: Thank you {name}. Your responses have been recorded. You qualify for INR 200 after successful full completion and verification.

questions.prompt: Do you consent to participate in this anonymous research? Reply YES or NO.
How reliable is your mobile internet for important tasks in your country (for example payments, classes, health access)? Reply with short text, and optional score 1-5.
In your experience, what is one telecom policy or regulation that helps users, and one that still causes friction?
How affordable are mobile data and telecom services for ordinary citizens where you live? Reply with short text, and optional score 1-5.
If service fails or billing is wrong, how easy is complaint resolution in practice?
